name: vscode-codedouble
description: Faithfully records editor interactions (accept / override / reject / viewed) into .codedouble/interactions.jsonl for the Self-Learning Code Double.

commands.title: CodeDouble: Mark selection as an override (I changed the AI's code)

codedouble.minInsertLines.description: A single change inserting at least this many lines is treated as a proposal (likely AI/paste).

codedouble.minInsertChars.description: ...or at least this many characters in one change.

codedouble.overrideWindowMs.description: If a proposal's region is edited within this window, it's an OVERRIDE.

codedouble.settleMs.description: A proposal not edited within this window is finalized as accepted.
